zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Hutchinson於1635年4月5日出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，他的父親George Hutchinson Jr.41歲，母親Margaret36歲。他於1656年8月8日與Alice Walcott在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1656年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加。他去世於1703年10月24日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Hutchinson于1635年4月5日出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，他的父亲George Hutchinson Jr.41岁，母亲Margaret36岁。他于1656年8月8日与Alice Walcott在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1656年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加。他去世于1703年10月24日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hutchinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): patronymic from the Old French personal name Hucheon (see Houchin ) + -son.
Irish: in Ireland and Scotland, adopted for Mac Uisdein and Mac Uistin; see McCutcheon .

History: Anne Marbury Hutchinson (1591–1643) and her husband William came from Lincolnshire, England, to MA in 1634. A religious dissident, she led the first attack on the Puritans and was banished from the Massachusetts Bay Colony. She moved to RI in 1638, and, after her husband's death in 1642, settled in NY, where the Hutchinson River was named in her honor. Ironically, the Hutchinson name stayed on in MA and one of her descendants, Thomas Hutchinson (1711–80), was royal governor of Massachusetts Bay Colony.

variants.name: Houchin
meanings: English (Essex): of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Huchon, a double diminutive of Hue (see Hugh ) common in Picardy, corresponding to Old French Hueçon, Huesson, modern French Husson. This was used as a personal name in Scotland, where it also became a surname and was adopted in Gaelic as Huisdean or Uisdean; see McCutcheon and compare Hutch .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Hutchinson was born on 5 April 1635, in Northamptonshire, England, his father, George Hutchinson Jr., was 41 and his mother, Margaret, was 36. He married Alice Walcott on 8 August 1656, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He immigrated to British Colonial America in 1656. He died on 24 October 1703, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Hutchinson est né le 5 avril 1635, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, George Hutchinson Jr., avait 41 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Alice Walcott le 8 août 1656, à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il a immigré au Amérique coloniale britannique en 1656. Il est décédé le 24 octobre 1703, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Hutchinson am 5. April 1635 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Hutchinson Jr. 41 und seine Mutter Margaret 36. Er hat am 8. August 1656 in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Alice Walcott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er ist 1656 nach British Colonial America eingewandert. Er starb am 24. Oktober 1703 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Hutchinson è nato il il 5 aprile 1635 nel Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, George Hutchinson Jr., aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Margaret, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Alice Walcott il 8 agosto 1656, nel Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Immigrato nel British Colonial America nel 1656. Morì il 24 ottobre 1703, nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Hutchinsonが1635年4月5日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父George Hutchinson Jr.は41歳，母Margaretは36歳であった。1656年8月8日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンでAlice Walcottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1656年にイギリス植民地アメリカに移住した。彼は1703年10月24日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンで68歳で死去した。

ko.Hatfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 하트필드
ko.Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴

ko.Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴
ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Hutchinson(이)가 1635년 4월 5일 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Hutchinson Jr.(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1656년 8월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 Alice Walcott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1656년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1703년 10월 24일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Hutchinson nasceu em 5 de abril de 1635, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, George Hutchinson Jr., tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Margaret, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Walcott em 8 de agosto de 1656, em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele imigrou para o British Colonial America em 1656. Ele faleceu em 24 de outubro de 1703, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Hutchinson родился 5 апреля 1635 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени George Hutchinson Jr. было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Walcott 8 августа 1656 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он иммигрировал в бритиш колоняль амирика в 1656 году. Он умер 24 октября 1703 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Hutchinson nació el 5 de abril de 1635, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, George Hutchinson Jr., tenía 41 años y su mamá, Margaret, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Alice Walcott el 8 de agosto de 1656, en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Inmigró a British Colonial America en 1656. Murió el 24 de octubre de 1703, en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 68 años.
